task_question: 结合制度和业务数据,核查以R004212为线索的拆分报销异常,返回异常ID和记录ID集合。

applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)
applicable_policies.rule: 不得将同一事项或同类事项拆分为多笔报销以规避审批权限。同一员工、同一费用类型在7天内出现2笔及以上报销,且合计金额达到《授权管理办法》附件二较高审批线的,应重点核查拆分规避审批。

policy_questions: 同一员工E0009在2025-04-03至2025-04-17期间，是否存在2笔及以上travel_lodging类型的报销？
若存在多笔，合计金额是否达到授权管理办法附件二中更高的审批线(AR-03即>=10000元)？
这些报销是否构成拆分报销以规避审批权限？

queries: list_expenses with employee_id=E0009, expense_type=travel_lodging, date_from=2025-04-03, date_to=2025-04-17
For each record found, get approvals to determine approval tier
Sum amounts of all matching records and compare against AR thresholds

execution_steps.artifact: Policy excerpts for Article 11 and 附件二
Query records for E0009 travel_lodging within 7-day window
Sum amounts and compare against AR thresholds

complexity_reasons: Aggregation, grouping, and batch filtering required (+1)
Thresholds and date boundaries: 7-day window + AR approval tier comparison (+1)
Two policies needed: reimbursement management + authorization management (+1)

context.task: Find all travel_lodging records for employee E0009 within 2025-04-03 to 2025-04-17 (7 days centered on 2025-04-10). For each record, retrieve its approval chain. Compute the sum of amounts. Determine if any pair or group of records within a 7-day sliding window exceeds the AR-03 threshold (>=10000) while individually staying below it.
context.question: Does employee E0009 have split reimbursement behavior for travel_lodging around R004212 (2025-04-10)?

stopping_conditions: All travel_lodging records for E0009 within the 7-day window identified
Approval tiers for all records verified
Evidence matrix with 100% coverage and pass status
